title: Craftable Nether Star
description: Another mod that adds a crafting recipe for Nether Stars because why not.
body:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df58140f196ff9b9838b4c37e1e5f96a7846b17.png)

Another Mod that adds a crafting recipe for Nether Stars because I didn't like the other ones.
Also, I don't want to put in so much effort just to get a stupid beacon.
Have a nice day, bye.
